description: The Lueders Park Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, based in Compton, California. Originating as the Lueders Park Hustlers, it was instrumental in forming the Bloods in 1972. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and weapons sales, with approximately 140 members in 2005. It has ongoing rivalries with several Crips sets.
